title: AN ACT CREATING THE BARRIO OF KALAWIT IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF SAN NICOLAS, PROVINCE OF  BATANGAS.

chunks.text:
H. No. 5114 / 53 OG No. 16, 5135 (August 31, 1957)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 1685, June 20, 1957 ]

AN ACT CREATING THE BARRIO OF KALAWIT IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF SAN NICOLAS, PROVINCE OF BATANGAS.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The sitio of Kalawit is separated from the barrio of Alas-as, Municipality of San Nicolas, Province of Batangas, and constituted into a barrio of the said Municipality to be known as the barrio of Kalawit.

SEC 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved, June 20, 1957.
